results.evidence: syncMarketplace() adds entry with name/source/version/description; marketplace.test.ts 'adds a plugin not present in manifest'
marketplace.ts:51-53 skips missing plugin.json, line 84-86 prints skipped warning
marketplace.ts:36-39 exits 1; test 'exits 1 when marketplace.json is not found'
syncMarketplace() version drift detection; test 'updates an existing entry when version drifts'
syncMarketplace() description drift detection; test 'updates an existing entry when description drifts'
syncMarketplace() unchanged path; test 'marks entry unchanged when version and description match'
marketplace.ts:88-91 returns before writeFileSync on dryRun; test 'does NOT write in --dry-run'
marketplace.ts:74-81 builds table rows with '+ added', '~ updated', 'unchanged' indicators
marketplace.ts:84-86 prints skipped dirs with yellow warning
index.ts .alias('mp'); smoke test confirmed both aliases work
marketplace.ts:103-104 prints 'already up to date', exits 0 naturally

findings.issue: Malformed marketplace.json causes unhandled JSON.parse exception instead of clean exit-1 with error message. Spec edge cases section specifies clean error + exit 1.
findings.suggestion: Wrap syncMarketplace call in try/catch, print error and call process.exit(1) on parse failure.
findings.impact: User sees a stack trace instead of a helpful error message when marketplace.json is corrupted.
